description: You are a molecular and cellular biologist designing a subunit vaccine for the Rabies virus. Before you can perform downstream epitope mapping and structural modeling of the primary immunogen (the Glycoprotein), you need to extract the amino acid sequences of all viral proteins from the NCBI reference genome (NC_001542.1) located at ~/UGENE_Data/virology/rabies_virus_genome.gb. Translate all CDS annotations into amino acid sequences and export them to ~/UGENE_Data/results/rabies_proteome.fasta in FASTA format. Additionally, create a summary text file at ~/UGENE_Data/results/proteome_summary.txt containing the total number of proteins exported, the name and length (in amino acids) of the largest protein, and the exact length of the Glycoprotein (G) in amino acids.

metadata.data_source: NCBI Reference Sequence: NC_001542.1 (Rabies virus, complete genome)
